stop.command: if command -v nolto >/dev/null 2>&1; then nolto flush --detach || true; else d="${XDG_CONFIG_HOME:-$HOME/.config}/nolto"; if [ ! -f "$d/.cli-hint-shown" ]; then mkdir -p "$d" 2>/dev/null || true; : > "$d/.cli-hint-shown" 2>/dev/null || true; echo "Nolto tip: install @nolto/cli (npm i -g @nolto/cli) to auto-send queued progress at session end. (shown once)" >&2; fi; fi
